stages.concept:
# Unit 164: 도치구문 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **도치구문**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 도치는 **주어와 동사의 순서가 바뀌는** 것이에요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정어(구)가 문두에** 올 때 → 주어 + 동사 도치

> **Never** have I seen such a beautiful sunset.
> 그런 아름다운 일몰을 본 적이 없다.

> **Hardly** did I know the truth.
> 나는 그 진실을 거의 몰랐다.

> **Not only** did she sing, but she also danced.
> 그녀는 노래만 한 것이 아니라 춤도 추었다.

> **Little** did I know about his plan.
> 나는 그의 계획에 대해 거의 몰랐다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **장소/방향의 부사(구)가 문두에** 올 때

> **Here** comes the bus.
> 여기 버스가 온다.

> **There** goes the bell.
> 종이 울린다.

> **On the wall** hangs a picture.
> 벽에 그림이 걸려 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **So/Neither로 동의**할 때

> "I like pizza." — "**So do** I." (나도 그래.)
> "I can't swim." — "**Neither can** I." (나도 못해.)

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"Never (       ) I dream of such a success." (나는 그런 성공을 결코 꿈꾸지 않았다.)
1. did ✅
2. have
3. had

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요! 부정어 Never가 문장 맨 앞으로 오면서 주어와 동사의 도치가 일어났어요. 본동사 'dream'이 일반동사이고 과거의 일(꿈꾸지 않았다)을 나타내므로, 조동사 did를 사용해서 'Never did I dream~'으로 쓰는 것이 정답입니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: 부정어 문두 → 도치! Here/There → 도치! So/Neither → 도치! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 164: 도치구문 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 보기 중 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Under the big tree (     ) .
> **정답** sat a cat

---

**02.** Never ? I seen such a beautiful sunset.
> **정답** have

---

**03.** Not only is she smart, ? she is also kind.
> **정답** but

---

**04.** Here ? the bus!
> **정답** comes

---

**05.** Hardly ? she arrived when it started to rain.
> **정답** had

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Never I have seen such a big dog.
(부정어 도치)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Never I have → Never have I

---

**07.** Hardly she had arrived when it started raining.
(부정어 도치)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Hardly she had → Hardly had she

---

**08.** Not only she is smart, but she is also kind.
(부정어 도치)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Not only she is → Not only is she

---

**09.** Here the bus comes!
(장소부사 도치, 주어가 명사)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** the bus comes → comes the bus

---

**10.** Seldom he does exercise.
(부정어 도치)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** he does → does he

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 한 번도 이렇게 큰 집을 본 적이 없다. (도치)
Never I such a big house.
> **정답** have, seen

---

**12.** 그녀가 도착하자마자 비가 내렸다. (도치)
Hardly she arrived when it started to rain.
> **정답** had, (Hardly had she arrived)

---

**13.** 그녀는 똑똑할 뿐만 아니라 친절하다. (도치)
Not only she smart, but she is also kind.
> **정답** is, (Not only is she smart)

---

**14.** 여기 버스가 온다! (도치)
Here the bus!
> **정답** comes

---

**15.** 그는 좀처럼 운동을 하지 않는다. (도치)
Seldom he exercise.
> **정답** does, (Seldom does he exercise)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 한 번도 이렇게 예쁜 꽃을 본 적이 없다. (도치)
Never I have seen such a pretty flower
> **정답** Never / have / I / seen / such / a / pretty / flower

---

**17.** 그녀가 도착하자마자 음악이 시작되었다. (도치)
Hardly she had arrived when the music started
> **정답** Hardly / had / she / arrived / when / the / music / started

---

**18.** 그는 똑똑할 뿐만 아니라 성실하다. (도치)
Not only he is smart but he is also hardworking
> **정답** Not / only / is / he / smart / but / he / is / also / hardworking

---

**19.** 여기 선생님이 오신다! (도치)
Here the comes teacher
> **정답** Here / comes / the / teacher

---

**20.** 그는 좀처럼 늦지 않는다. (도치)
Seldom he does arrive late
> **정답** Seldom / does / he / arrive / late
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 164: 도치구문 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Never _______________ such a big waterfall.
I haven't seen
have I seen
haven't seen
I have seen
> **정답** have I seen

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He likes music, and _______________.
so am I
so did I
so do I
so I do
> **정답** so do I

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Into the pool _____________________.
the children jumped
do the children jump
jumped the children
did the children jump
> **정답** jumped the children

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Jane won't like the plan.
B: _________________. He will be against it.
Neither Paul will
So will Paul
Neither will Paul
So is Paul
> **정답** Neither will Paul

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Hardly _____________________ my aunt.
I visited
did I visit
I did visit
did I visited
> **정답** did I visit

---

**06.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
He never dreamed that he would become a famous
actor.
Never he dreamed that he would become a
famous actor.
Never he did dream that he would become a
famous actor.
Never did dream he that he would become a
famous actor.
Never did he dream that he would become a
famous actor.
> **정답** Never did he dream that he would become a famous
actor.

---

**07.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
I have hardly seen such a beautiful woman.
Hardly have I seen such a beautiful woman.
Hardly I have seen such a beautiful woman.
Hardly have seen such a beautiful woman.
Hardly I have seen such a beautiful woman.
> **정답** Hardly have I seen such a beautiful woman.

---

**08.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
A few books were on the desk.
On the desk a few books was.
On the desk a few books were.
On the desk were a few books.
On the desk was a few books.
> **정답** On the desk were a few books.

---

**09.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
A bird passed right over my head.
Right over my head a bird passed.
Right over my head a bird did pass.
Right over my head passed a bird.
Right over my head did pass a bird.
> **정답** Right over my head passed a bird.

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
We hardly thought that he passed the exam.
Hardly did we think that he passed the exam.
Hardly we thought that he passed the exam.
Hardly we did think that he passed the exam.
Hardly thought we that he passed the exam.
> **정답** Hardly did we think that he passed the exam.

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 강조되도록 바르게 영작한 것을
고르시오.
그는 그렇게 맛있는 음식을 결코 맛본 적이 없다.
He never has tasted such a delicious dish.
Never he has tasted such a delicious dish.
Never has he tasted such a delicious dish.
Never he tasted such a delicious dish.
> **정답** Never has he tasted such a delicious dish.

---

**12.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 강조되도록 바르게 영작한 것을
고르시오.
그는 인터넷 뱅킹을 거의 이용하지 않는다.
Rarely he uses internet banking.
Rarely does he use internet banking.
Rarely do he use internet banking.
Rarely he does use internet banking.
> **정답** Rarely does he use internet banking.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Jenny는 뉴욕에서 공부한다.
Jenny does study in New York.
Jenny studies in New York.
In New York studies Jenny.
In New York Jenny studies.
> **정답** In New York studies Jenny.

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
우리 엄마는 뮤지컬을 좋아하는데, 나도 그렇다.
My mom likes musicals, and so do I.
My mom likes musicals, and so did I.
My mom likes musicals, and so I do.
My mom likes musicals, and so does I.
> **정답** My mom likes musicals, and so do I.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Sally는 회의에 가지 않았고, 나도 가지 않았다.
Sally didn't go to the meeting, and either did I.
Sally didn't go to the meeting, and neither do
I.
Sally didn't go to the meeting, and neither I
did.
Sally didn't go to the meeting, and neither did
I.
> **정답** Sally didn't go to the meeting, and neither did I.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Rarely does he make speeches in public.
Never do some kids eat mushroom.
Between the two boys stood she.
Down the stream did the log float.
> **정답** Down the stream did the log float.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Rarely does she exercise on weekends.
Hardly can he walk after the accident.
Located at the corner the bookstore is.
Under the sea is a white shark.
> **정답** Located at the corner the bookstore is.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Hardly I dreamed that I would meet him at the
concert.
Behind Tom stood David.
Never has he traveled to Europe.
A lot of people go to the city's festival, and so
do I.
> **정답** Hardly I dreamed that I would meet him at the
concert.

---

**19.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Down came the rain all night.
On top of the drawers are your socks.
Hardly do he show his feelings.
Never was he responsible for any mistakes.
> **정답** Hardly do he show his feelings.

---

**20.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Chris will learn Chinese during winter
vacation, and so I will.
I didn't pay attention to the class, and neither
did she.
She can speak Japanese, and so can I.
I don't like soccer, and neither does my
brother.
> **정답** Chris will learn Chinese during winter vacation, and
so I will.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 164 도치구문중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 부사구나 부정어를 강조하는 문장으로 바꾸어
쓰시오.
A little girl played in the park.
→ _________________________________________
정답 In the park played a little girl.

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 부사구나 부정어를 강조하는 문장으로 바꾸어
쓰시오.
She rarely drinks coffee after dinner.
→ ___________________________________ after
dinner.
정답 Rarely does she drink coffee

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분으로 시작하여 문장을 다시 쓸 때 빈칸을
완성하시오.
He never dreamed he would fail the exam.
→ _______________________ he would fail the exam.
정답 Never did he dream

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
A: I don't want to go outside. It is too cold.
B: Neither  (     )   (     ) . I will stay at home.
정답 do, I

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
A: I like listening to music.
B: So  (     )   (     ) . I like listening to classical
music.
정답 do, I

---

**06.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오.
그녀는 요즈음 책을 거의 읽지 않는다. [read]
Hardly  (     )   (     )   (     )  any books these
days.
정답 does, she, read

---

**07.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오.
그는 거의 직장에 지각하지 않았다. [be late for]
Rarely  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  work.
정답 was, he, late, for

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 문장을
완성하시오.
Among the top ten three females were.
→ Among the top ten  (     ) .
정답 were three females

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 문장을
완성하시오.
Never he is kind to others.
→ Never  (     )  to others.
정답 is he kind

---

**10.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 문장을
완성하시오.
Hardly I could recognize him because I didn't wear
my glasses.
→  (     )  because I
didn't wear my glasses.
정답 Hardly could I recognize him

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 164: 도치구문 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Never _______________ such a tall building.
I haven't seen have I seen haven't seen I have seen
> 정답: have I seen

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She likes art, and _______________ . so am I so did I so do I so I do
> 정답: so do I

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Into the lake _____________________.
the ducks jumped do the ducks jump jumped the ducks did the ducks jump
> 정답: jumped the ducks

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Amy won't agree to the plan.
B: _________________.
He will oppose it too.
Neither Tom will So will Tom Neither will Tom So is Tom
> 정답: Neither will Tom

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Hardly _____________________ my uncle.
I visited did I visit I did visit did I visited
> 정답: did I visit

---

**06.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
She never imagined that she would become a famous painter.
Never she imagined that she would become a famous painter.
Never she did imagine that she would become a famous painter.
Never did imagine she that she would become a famous painter.
Never did she imagine that she would become a famous painter.
> 정답: Never did she imagine that she would become a famous

---

**07.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
I have hardly seen such a gorgeous sunset.
Hardly have I seen such a gorgeous sunset.
Hardly I have seen such a gorgeous sunset.
Hardly have seen such a gorgeous sunset.
Hardly I have seen such a gorgeous sunset.
> 정답: Hardly have I seen such a gorgeous sunset.

---

**08.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
Several paintings were on the wall.
On the wall several paintings was.
On the wall several paintings were.
On the wall were several paintings.
On the wall was several paintings.
> 정답: On the wall were several paintings.

---

**09.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
A butterfly flew right over my head.
Right over my head a butterfly flew.
Right over my head a butterfly did fly.
Right over my head flew a butterfly.
Right over my head did fly a butterfly.
> 정답: Right over my head flew a butterfly.

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장을 고르시오.
We hardly believed that she won the award.
Hardly did we believe that she won the award.
Hardly we believed that she won the award.
Hardly we did believe that she won the award.
Hardly believed we that she won the award.
> 정답: Hardly did we believe that she won the award.

---

**11.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 강조되도록 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 그렇게 아름다운 풍경을 결코 본 적이 없다.
She never has seen such a beautiful landscape.
Never she has seen such a beautiful landscape.
Never has she seen such a beautiful landscape.
Never she saw such a beautiful landscape.
> 정답: Never has she seen such a beautiful landscape.

---

**12.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 강조되도록 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 대중 앞에서 거의 발표를 하지 않는다.
Rarely he presents in public.
Rarely does he present in public.
Rarely do he present in public.
Rarely he does present in public.
> 정답: Rarely does he present in public.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 런던에서 공부한다.
Amy does study in London.
Amy studies in London.
In London studies Amy.
In London Amy studies.
> 정답: In London studies Amy.

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
우리 아빠는 클래식 음악을 좋아하는데, 나도 그렇다.
My dad likes classical music, and so do I.
My dad likes classical music, and so did I.
My dad likes classical music, and so I do.
My dad likes classical music, and so does I.
> 정답: My dad likes classical music, and so do I.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 연습에 가지 않았고, 나도 가지 않았다.
Tom didn't go to practice, and either did I.
Tom didn't go to practice, and neither do I.
Tom didn't go to practice, and neither I did.
Tom didn't go to practice, and neither did I.
> 정답: Tom didn't go to practice, and neither did I.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Rarely does she cook on weekdays.
Never do some kids eat spinach.
Between the two chairs stood he.
Down the hill did the ball roll.
> 정답: Down the hill did the ball roll.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Rarely does he exercise on weekdays.
Hardly can she focus after the long trip.
Located at the intersection the pharmacy is.
Under the bridge is a small boat.
> 정답: Located at the intersection the pharmacy is.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
